title: Xtra Silky Korean Renkon Lotus Root Gimbap
description: A solo dinner featuring renkon lotus root and dashi extract, this vegetarian friendly dish is a unique twist on traditional Korean gimbap.

ingredients.name: Renkon lotus root
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1/4 inch thick rounds

ingredients.name: Sushi rice
ingredients.notes: cooked and seasoned with salt and sugar

instructions: Prepare the renkon lotus root by soaking the sliced rounds in cold water for 30 minutes to remove excess starch.
Drain and rinse the lotus root slices, then blanch them in boiling water for 5 minutes to tenderize.
In a small saucepan, combine the dashi extract, sesame oil, salt, sugar, and rice vinegar, and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the dashi mixture by half, stirring constantly, then remove from heat and let cool.
Lay a noru seaweed sheet flat on a cutting board, with the shiny side facing down.
Spread a thin layer of sushi rice onto the seaweed, leaving a 1 inch border at the top.
Arrange the blanched lotus root slices horizontally across the center of the rice.
Drizzle the cooled dashi mixture over the lotus root, then roll the gimbap tightly using a bamboo sushi mat.
Slice the rolled gimbap into 8 equal pieces, then serve immediately.
